title: Dow Jones Bear Market: This Industrial Stock Is a Smart Buy
text: With the broader market still trading in a volatile fashion, investors should consider companies already deep in bear territory.

title: Selecting Dividend Aristocrats Using SCHD's Methodology - Initial Results
text: I propose leveraging the stock selection criteria from the underlying index of SCHD to build a portfolio with a subset of Dividend Aristocrats. I am tracking two portfolios built using this process and comparing the results to NOBL and SCHD.

title: 3 Cheap Industrial Stocks to Buy Now and Never Sell
text: If you're looking to buy some stocks that look historically cheap, this trio of industrial names should be on your list.

title: Here's Why Investors Should Retain A. O. Smith (AOS) Stock (Revised)
text: A. O. Smith (AOS) is poised to benefit from strength in its North American boiler business owing to pricing actions. The company's measures to reward its shareholders are encouraging.

text: A. O. Smith (AOS) is poised to benefit from strength in its North America boiler business, owing to pricing actions. The company's measures to reward its shareholders are encouraging.

title: Nearing Retirement? The 3 Best Industrial Dividend Stocks to Buy Now
text: Industrial stocks have fallen along with the market, opening up attractive entry points in some great companies.

title: My Top Industrial Stock to Buy and Hold Forever
text: A.O. Smith sells a must-have product that will never go out of style.

title: 3 Growth Stocks That Need a New CEO Immediately
text: It hasn't been a good year for growth stocks. The iShares S&P 500 Growth exchange-traded fund (NYSEARCA: IVW ) is down nearly 25% with one month to go in 2022.
